questions.sentence: One of the most powerful features of Vuejs is its use of directives
Directive's are special attributes with the v prefix that apply reactive behavior to the DOM
Two of the most commonly used directives are v-if and v-for
The v-if directive is used for conditional rendering it adds or removes an element based on the truthiness of an expression
The v-for directive is used to render a list of items based on an array
Mastering these directives allows developers to create highly interactive and data driven user interfaces with minimal effort
